about: G-electra Club is focused on promoting innovation in technology and organizing events such as workshops, hackathons, and tech talks. Our mission is to foster a collaborative environment where students can develop skills in software development, hardware engineering, marketing, design, and content creation.

past.name: Havana
past.description: Havana is the biggest event ever organized by G-electra Club. It was a celebration of technology, creativity, and innovation.

upcoming.name: HAVANA 2026
upcoming.description: Havana is the biggest event ever organized by G-electra Club. It is a celebration of technology, creativity, and innovation. The event will feature workshops, hackathons, tech talks, and exhibitions showcasing the latest advancements in technology.
